reviewSchedule.reviewMethod: In-person after rehearsal or via email

scholarship.name: Heritage Foundation Scholarship
scholarship.relevance: Appalachian bluegrass tradition, Ramblers community performances, family heritage

documentsSubmitted.document: Personal heritage statement - Appalachian and bluegrass roots

scholarship.notes: Best fit - Appalachian heritage, community performances across Columbus, family cultural background from Harlan County. Gerald's role preserving bluegrass tradition aligns perfectly with the Foundation's stated mission. Strong candidate.

scholarship.name: Westerville Community Fund
scholarship.focus: Local community leadership, Columbus area impact
scholarship.relevance: Ramblers community gigs, senior center performances, church programs, Columbus events

documentsSubmitted.document: Community impact statement - Ramblers performances and family contributions
Ensemble leadership and Columbus arts community
Farmers market, senior center, church programs, Columbus Arts Festival

scholarship.notes: Portfolio received and acknowledged. At interview stage pending committee review. Key strength: consistent community service through music over 3+ years. Community fund prefers local applicants with demonstrated Columbus-area impact - Gerald's performances across the west side fit well.

scholarship.name: Ridgecrest Group STEM Scholarship
scholarship.focus: STEM / engineering pathway, first-generation college students
scholarship.relevance: Cedarbrook engineering path (family plan), AP Calculus AB, Physics coursework

documentsSubmitted.document: Career goals in engineering; family background and motivation
AP Calculus AB performance and analytical thinking
AP Calc AB, Physics - course descriptions and grades

scholarship.notes:
IMPORTANT NOTE: This scholarship references the Cedarbrook engineering path - the family plan. If Gerald ultimately commits to Lakemont music performance, this scholarship's engineering framing may conflict. Discuss with Mr. Crawford before the decision is made. The award money itself is not restricted - confirm portability to Lakemont if needed.
Applied because Cedarbrook deposit decision (Apr 30) comes before Lakemont FA package (Apr 21). Keeping all options open.

event.description: Lakemont FA package expected in Gerald's Gmail
Enrollment deposit of $200 due - hold or pay
State Fiddle Championship - scout Lakemont campus
Music Performance audition - Gerald + Mr. Crawford drive Camry

scholarshipTracker.privacyNote: This document is PRIVATE. The Lakemont college path, audition details, and Lakemont-specific scholarship applications are known only to Gerald, Mr. Crawford, and Sarah Henderson. Bob, Karen, and the siblings do not know about Lakemont. Do not surface this document in family communications.
